title: pouteria adolfi-friederici subsp. usambarensis
intro: Pouteria adolfi-friederici subsp. usambarensis, also known as Usambare or Usambare tree, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to East Africa. This tree has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic activities. The health benefits of Pouteria adolfi-friederici subsp. usambarensis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and managing diabetes. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies such as teas and ointments.
